# CVPixelFormatDescriptionArrayCreateWithAllPixelFormatTypes(_:)

**Function**

Returns all the pixel format descriptions known to Core Video.

## Declaration

```swift
func CVPixelFormatDescriptionArrayCreateWithAllPixelFormatTypes(_ allocator: CFAllocator?) -> CFArray?
```

## Parameters

- **allocator**: The allocator to use when creating the description. Pass `NULL` to specify the default allocator.

## Return Value

An array of Core Foundation dictionaries, each containing a pixel format description. See [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/pixel-format-description-keys] for a list of keys relevant to the format description.
title: CVPixelFormatDescriptionArrayCreateWithAllPixelFormatTypes(_:)
